TableJobs.selectedRow.captain_name : 'selected captain'}...`); TriggerMailout.run(() => { SyncMailoutData.run(() => { storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', 'Captain mailout sent.'); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert('Captain mailout sent', 'success'); }, (error) => { const message = `Mailout sent, but refresh failed: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); }); }, (error) => { const message = `Error: ${error?.message || 'Unknown error occurred'}`; storeValue('teamMailoutStatus', message); storeValue('teamMailoutRunning', false); showAlert(message, 'error'); });}}
